texto: ...continue on the right path. You have potential...Don't give up. Don't let yourself get down and quit studying or fighting for what you want. One day something good is bound to happen. You just have to keep at it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Isabela Pamelli Martins sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “...continue on the right path. You have potential...Don't give up. Don't let yourself get down an…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, perseverance, continue, útil em momentos de estudos e reflexao.
